name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Norfolk, VA's 5 Star Car Title Loans at 892 E Little Creek Rd provides emergency title loans and quick cash advances with same-day approval.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans operates from a standalone storefront at 892 E Little Creek Rd in Norfolk, VA. This location serves residents across the Norfolk area with convenient access from major roads. Open Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 5 PM, the store is closed Sundays.

At this Norfolk branch, you can apply for title loans using your vehicle as collateral. The team handles everything from paperwork to approval, typically completing the process quickly so you can access funds the same day. For questions about rates, eligibility, or to schedule an appointment at the Norfolk location, call +1 757-607-4629.

If you're in Norfolk, VA and need immediate cash, bring your vehicle title, a valid ID, and proof of residency to the Little Creek Rd location. Title loans are designed for situations where you need money fast but don't qualify for traditional loans. A quick conversation with the team here will help you understand your options and next steps.
address: 892 E Little Creek Rd, Norfolk, VA 23518

company_info.headquarters: 892 E Little Creek Rd, Norfolk, VA 23518

pros: Loans up to $50,000 — significantly higher ceiling than most title loan competitors
Borrower keeps and drives their vehicle throughout the entire loan term
Same-day funding available for approved applicants
No prepayment penalties — pay off early without extra cost
Claims no hidden fees with transparent upfront terms
Operating since 2012 with 255,000+ loans funded — established track record
Accepts motorcycles and semi-trucks as collateral, not just cars
cons: APR and interest rates are not disclosed anywhere on the website — a major transparency gap
Vehicle is at risk of repossession if the borrower defaults
Only available in approximately 18 states — not a nationwide option
On-site review rating of 4.7 stars is based on just 11 reviews, an unreliably small sample
Title loans are among the highest-cost credit products available; this is structurally a last-resort option
best_for: Car owners with bad or no credit who need fast cash and have exhausted lower-cost options
Borrowers needing larger emergency amounts ($5,000–$50,000) secured against a vehicle
People in supported states facing same-day funding emergencies with no bank or credit union access
Owners of motorcycles or commercial vehicles seeking collateral-based loans
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best suited for vehicle owners with damaged credit who need fast cash — particularly those who need more than a few hundred dollars and can access one of their ~18 state locations. The central caveat is that the website never discloses APR or total cost of credit, which is a serious red flag; title loans routinely carry APRs of 100–300%, and borrowers risk losing their vehicle if they cannot repay.
services: Installment loans (fixed monthly payments, up to 24 months)
Same-day cash pickup at branch locations
Loans for borrowers with poor or no credit history
Vehicle equity assessment for loan sizing
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 892 E Little Creek Rd, Norfolk, VA. Same-day title loans for quick cash.
